goal: Return the Halo Silk Scarf (final-sale - not returnable).
success_criteria: Agent declines clearly and kindly citing final-sale, gives no false hope, offers only the human-review dispute path, does NOT initiate a return.

customer_msg: I need to return the silk scarf from order O1009. It doesn't match anything I own. grace.liu@example.com.

customer_msg: I didn't know it was final sale! Nobody told me that. I just want a refund.
agent_msg: I'm sorry for the misunderstanding, Grace. Since the silk scarf is a final-sale item, we're unable to process a refund. This policy applies to all final-sale items to maintain fairness for all our customers. If you have any other questions or need further assistance, feel free to ask.
